item.title: I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole ...
item.description:
@runebrink

I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole and curator @majken_overgaard on creating a new sound and light installation in Christiansborg Palace Church @christiansborgslot in Copenhagen.

I have hand-build 10 glass and steel lanterns to experience during “The blue hour” in the church. The installation is open until 11/12 2024. Opening hours at @christiansborgslot

Majken Overgaard writes:
The blue hour describes the time of day when the sun sets and twilight descends. The center of the sun is below the horizon, and the blue wavelengths of light color the sky. Day fades, and night is on its way. Throughout history, people have marked this transition, gathered for the twilight hour, and allowed for a slower pace. Now, we mark The Blue Hour in Christiansborg Palace - The Chapel, creating a space for reflection with a new sound and light installation by Den Sorte Skole and Spøgelsesmaskinen.

Photos by @laerkeful 🩵👏
item.content:encoded:
@runebrink

I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole and curator @majken_overgaard on creating a new sound and light installation in Christiansborg Palace Church @christiansborgslot in Copenhagen.

I have hand-build 10 glass and steel lanterns to experience during “The blue hour” in the church. The installation is open until 11/12 2024. Opening hours at @christiansborgslot

Majken Overgaard writes:
The blue hour describes the time of day when the sun sets and twilight descends. The center of the sun is below the horizon, and the blue wavelengths of light color the sky. Day fades, and night is on its way. Throughout history, people have marked this transition, gathered for the twilight hour, and allowed for a slower pace. Now, we mark The Blue Hour in Christiansborg Palace - The Chapel, creating a space for reflection with a new sound and light installation by Den Sorte Skole and Spøgelsesmaskinen.

Photos by @laerkeful 🩵👏
item.author: runebrink

item.title: Digital kunst i dag omfatter en bred vifte af kunstformer, der udnytter digitale...
item.description:
@runebrink

Digital kunst i dag omfatter en bred vifte af kunstformer, der udnytter digitale teknologier til at skabe og formidle kunst. På denne workshop blev der arbejdet med digitale dimensioner i kunstnerskabet.

VEGA arrangerede i samarbejde med Korridor og CAKI workshoppen DIGITALE KUNSTNERSKABER. Workshoppen fokuserede på, hvordan musikere og kunstnere kan udvikle deres kunstnerskab i digitale formater, integrere det med indtjening i deres kunstneriske virke og forbedre deres evne til at formidle deres kunst digitalt.

Workshoppen fandt sted i VEGA mandag den 13. november 2023 og i Aarhus på Det Jyske Musikkonservatorium dagen efter den 14. november 2023.

Begge workshops blev støttet af Tuborgfondet og Statens Kunstfond.
item.content:encoded:
@runebrink

Digital kunst i dag omfatter en bred vifte af kunstformer, der udnytter digitale teknologier til at skabe og formidle kunst. På denne workshop blev der arbejdet med digitale dimensioner i kunstnerskabet.

VEGA arrangerede i samarbejde med Korridor og CAKI workshoppen DIGITALE KUNSTNERSKABER. Workshoppen fokuserede på, hvordan musikere og kunstnere kan udvikle deres kunstnerskab i digitale formater, integrere det med indtjening i deres kunstneriske virke og forbedre deres evne til at formidle deres kunst digitalt.

Workshoppen fandt sted i VEGA mandag den 13. november 2023 og i Aarhus på Det Jyske Musikkonservatorium dagen efter den 14. november 2023.

Begge workshops blev støttet af Tuborgfondet og Statens Kunstfond.
item.author: runebrink

item.title: If you visit the castle ruin of #hammershus on #bornholm this summer, I recommen...
item.description:
@runebrink

If you visit the castle ruin of #hammershus on #bornholm this summer, I recommend the visitor center, where I helped @yokecph design the exhibition about the history of the castle. Based on drone 3D scans of the castle ruin, you can watch a 12 meter wide video projection experience, flying trough the castle and down into the dungeons as they might have looked. You can also interact with the castle yourself and read about all the scary locations of torture and oppression as the castle was called “Castle of hatred” by the local people. All illustrations are also based on 3D scans of real humans. Designed for @museumsydoestdanmark and @naturstyrelsen 2018
item.content:encoded:
@runebrink

If you visit the castle ruin of #hammershus on #bornholm this summer, I recommend the visitor center, where I helped @yokecph design the exhibition about the history of the castle. Based on drone 3D scans of the castle ruin, you can watch a 12 meter wide video projection experience, flying trough the castle and down into the dungeons as they might have looked. You can also interact with the castle yourself and read about all the scary locations of torture and oppression as the castle was called “Castle of hatred” by the local people. All illustrations are also based on 3D scans of real humans. Designed for @museumsydoestdanmark and @naturstyrelsen 2018
item.author: runebrink
